# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: "https://webapp1.com, https://webapp2.com"
      methods: "GET, POST, PUT"
      headers: "Authorization, Content-Type, X-Custom-Header"
      credentials: true
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"
    tags:
      - global

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names: "apikey"
      run_on_preflight: false
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - global

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      limit_by: "consumer"
      policy: "local"
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - global

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: "http://example-service.local"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: "*"
          methods: "GET"
          headers: "Content-Type"
          credentials: false
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        tags:
          - service

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          minute: 500
          hour: 5000
          limit_by: "service"
          policy: "redis"
          redis_host: "redis.local"
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service

routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths:
      - "/example"
    service: "example-service"
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - route

      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: "https://specific-origin.com"
          methods: "GET, POST"
          headers: "Authorization, X-Another-Custom-Header"
          credentials: true
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        tags:
          - route

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 20
          minute: 200
          hour: 2000
          limit_by: "credential"
          policy: "cluster"
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - route
